methodology: Separated CONTENT parity from FEATURE parity. Counts from data/audit/unimported-legacy-content.json, pathway catalog sync, optional Prisma, and route scans — not claims without file evidence.

items.name: Legacy Vite client feature surface
items.recommendedAction: Do not resurrect Vite shell; port behaviors into Next routes
items.notes: Legacy client retained for reference per restoration map — not production.
